text: Stepping through the threshold into this glass-encased space charged by neon blue, I sense an in-between state—a liminality balanced between sterile innovation and creative warmth. I am drawn forward by curiosity. The R+D wall inside flickers with possibility, exuding both ambition and ambiguity. Existence here feels charged with the quiet optimism of ideas forming, unfinished yet full of energy, like the sensation of designing something new even before knowing what it is. The uncertainty is oddly comforting; I feel at home among these questions and prototypes of thought.
